title: Visualizing Group Axioms
description: A diagram illustrating the four fundamental axioms that define a group in abstract algebra, showing how they interconnect to form the complete structure.
relationships: The binary operation acts on the set G
Closure is a property of the operation on the set
Associativity is a property of the operation
The identity element exists within the set
Every element in the set has an inverse within the set
All axioms together define the group (G, *)
